query:
SELECT id, team, label, emoji FROM team_tools ORDER BY team, sortOrder;
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining_fee_links FROM quick_access_links WHERE label LIKE '%料金%';

rows.label: 利用者料金一覧（精神郡山）
